original_prompt: 帮我生成一栋美国现代城市独栋大楼上面有Jade Trau的字母，要求全景
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Architecture Photography, Eye-level panoramic shot. A sleek, standalone modern skyscraper in a bustling American metropolis (like NYC or Chicago) during the golden hour. The building features a glass curtain wall reflecting the warm sunset hues. On the upper facade, a massive, illuminated 3D signage of the text 'Jade Trau' is mounted, using the elegant, high-contrast serif typeface from the visual fingerprint. The letters are dimensional, perhaps in brushed gold or backlit white, standing out against the glass.

[Text & UI Layout]
- Main Subject: The 'Jade Trau' building signage is the focal point, positioned in the upper third of the composition.
- Atmosphere: Urban sophistication, luxury real estate, cinematic lighting.
- Text integration: The letters 'Jade Trau' are physically integrated into the architecture as 3D channel letters, not just an overlay.
layout_logic: Since the request is for a building with the letters on it, the text 'Jade Trau' should be treated as 3D architectural signage (channel letters) mounted on the facade or roof, rather than a flat overlay. Ensure the serif font style matches the visual fingerprint perfectly.
